0, 1))\\n\\n    def lr_lambda(step_idx: int) -> float:\\n        step_num = step_idx + 1\\n        if step_num <= warmup_steps:\\n            return step_num / warmup_steps\\n        progress = (step_num - warmup_steps) / max(total_steps - warmup_steps, 1)\\n        return 0.1 + 0.9 * 0.5 * (1.0 + np.cos(np.pi * progress))\\n\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda=lr_lambda)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"The current scheduler is disabled, and its implementation would decay over an irrelevant 100-epoch horizon.
